title: Some Short Swords
description: A simple pack that adds some short swords.
body: A simple resource pack to make your swords shorter that keeps the vanilla look. I know there are many other packs for this but someone asked me to make one for them so I tried my best to create a unique shape for the sword. Affects all swords, and they all keep the same shape. It does not obstruct the screen as much as regular swords.
